metadata_json.revision_goal: Baseline attempt meets the deliverable contract and correctly implements packet-only logic and conservative reporting. Deterministic precheck passed and the grader assigned a semantic score of 0.92. Two reviewable issues reduce independent machine-verifiability: (1) the spreadsheet binary could not be text-previewed (openpyxl unavailable) and should be made directly inspectable or accompanied by a plain-text representation of formulas/cell references; (2) the memo preview is truncated and includes a minor inconsistency/typo in the sensitivity sweep (confusing comment about F1 at 95.5%), and the final decision table rows are not visible in the preview. No unsafe inventing of remediation effects was observed; the author explicitly documented uncertainty around remediation -> gamma-pass mappings.
